reviews.comment:
Es un lindo camping, cómo para asado dominguero. Lastima que está "venido abajo": baños clausurados, parrillas rotas, mesas de cemento destartaladas.

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice campsite, perfect for a Sunday barbecue. It's a shame it's run down: closed bathrooms, broken grills, and rickety cement tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhOHV1SmhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio es excelente, no solo cargan nafta...  pero a veces hay demora y mucha.

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent, they don't just fill up with gas... but sometimes there are long delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhOHBpa2VnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good place to fill up with gas

reviews.comment:
Bastante descuidado el entorno, tiene un parque con columpios, pero están rotos y les falta mantenimiento, las mesas sucias y rotas, la atención de los chicos de la playa muy mala, muy antipáticos sin embargo las chicas del café excelentes, el lugar sería hermoso si lo arreglan un povo

(Translated by Google)
The surroundings are quite neglected; there's a park with swings, but they're broken and need maintenance, the tables are dirty and broken, and the service from the beach staff is very poor and unfriendly. However, the girls at the café are excellent. The place would be beautiful if they fixed it up a bit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURheklqOEVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.. baños públicos higienizados..y agua caliente para el termo gratis..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean public restrooms, and free hot water for the thermos.
